examples: The trapeze artist put on an amazing acrobatic display.

definitions.text: A piece of work to be presented visually.
examples: Pupils are expected to produce a wall display about a country of their choice.

definitions.text: A device, furniture or marketing-oriented bulk packaging for visual presentation for sales promotion.
To show conspicuously; to exhibit; to demonstrate; to manifest.
To make a display; to act as one making a show or demonstration.
To extend the front of (a column), bringing it into line, deploy.
